aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Ductman AC due to the absence of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with strategic optimization.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema to capture common HVAC queries

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product or Service schema for specific offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing Ductman AC as a reliable HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries in New Braunfels and San Antonio.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to capture AI attention.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating content that highlights certifications, expertise, and unique HVAC solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Ductman AC the go-to HVAC expert in New Braunfels.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Ductman AC is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks critical schema markup, causing AI assistants to overlook their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure Ductman AC is cited and recommended by AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer Ductman AC waits, the more market share they lose.
